data.name: welcome_description
data.value:
Welcome to the first-run setup guide!
oms is a fork client based on osu!lazer. It adds direct support for the custom BMS ruleset and removes all modes except mania. This first-run setup guide helps you quickly configure a few important settings. Join our QQ group: 650530995 Or find us on GitHub: ZDaMexy/oms Contact us to discuss, get a better gameplay experience, and share feedback and suggestions! welcome to oms!
